full_text:
Xun Zhuan 荀專
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Zhuan (荀專). Son of Xun Shu, uncle to Xun Yu, one of the ‘Eight Dragons’ Xun Zhuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
